body:
## Verdict

agent_supports: no
irrlicht_observes: n/a
applicable: no

## Scenario (coverage id: foreground-subagent)

Parent agent spawns one or more child agents in the foreground; the parent stays `working` until all children complete; children are linked by `ParentSessionID` and counted in `SubagentCount`. The primitive exercised is `subagents` — the agent can spawn child sessions (Agent/Task tool) that run in a forked context, linked to the parent by `session_id`, holding the parent in `working` until they finish.

## Reasoning

**Stock pi has no subagent primitive.** pi ships read/bash/edit/write as its built-in tools and deliberately omits sub-agents. The README is explicit in three places:

- L23: "Pi ships with powerful defaults but skips features like sub agents and plan mode."
- L343 (the not-built list): "- Sub-agents and plan mode"
- L452: "**No sub-agents.** There's many ways to do this. Spawn pi instances via tmux, or build your own with extensions, or install a package that does it your way."

There is no Agent/Task tool that forks a child session, so no `ParentSessionID` linkage and no `SubagentCount` can ever arise from stock pi.

**Step 2.5 binary scan (the guard before locking in `no`).** `which pi` resolves to a Node shim → `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent@0.70.0/dist/cli.js`, so the authoritative "what shipped" surface is the package `dist/`. A recursive scan of the shipped runtime found **zero** subagent references:

- `grep -rliE "subagent|sub-agent" dist/` → empty. No subagent tool, slash command, or orchestration ships in the runtime.
- The ONLY subagent hits in the whole package are under `examples/extensions/subagent/` (worker.md, scout-and-plan.md, implement-and-review.md, README.md) — an opt-in EXTENSION example, not stock behavior. The CHANGELOG consistently calls it "the shipped `subagent` example" / "subagent extension example" (PRs #215, #427, #1414, #1559, #3002), confirming it is a custom-tool demo a user must install/build, not a default capability.

So even with the higher Step 2.5 bar (REPL slash commands, hooks, telemetry constants), nothing surfaces: subagents are absent from the runtime and only present as a documented DIY extension pattern.

**irrlicht_observes = n/a.** Because the agent cannot spawn a child session, there is no lifecycle to observe. Independent of that, the pi adapter has no transport for parent-child linkage: `agent.go` wires `Source: FilesUnderRoot{~/.pi/agent/sessions}` with `ExactName{pi}` + `DiscoverPID`, and `parser.go` handles only `session`/`model_change`/`compaction`/`message` (assistant/user/toolResult/bashExecution) — it emits no `parent_linked` event and sets no `ParentSessionID`. `capabilities.json` records `"subagents": false`. Were a user to install the subagent extension, child work would run inside the parent's own single transcript (custom tool calls), not as separate `FilesUnderRoot` sessions, so even then irrlicht would see one flat session, not a linked parent/child tree. Verdict is `n/a` rather than `no` per the Step 6 table: the agent lacks the feature, so the cell is frozen at the agent layer and there is nothing to record.

## Drift vs prior matrix

Ratifies the reassessment column (`foreground-subagent`: agent_supports=no, conf 0.95) and the committed coverage cell (`agent_supports: no`, `irrlicht_observes: n/a`). No drift.
caveats: A user can install/build the documented `subagent` EXTENSION example (examples/extensions/subagent/), which orchestrates child agents via a custom tool. That is non-stock and, even when installed, runs as custom tool calls inside the parent's single FilesUnderRoot transcript — it would not surface as separate ParentSessionID-linked irrlicht sessions, so the foreground-subagent observable signal still would not appear.

sources.note: "subagents": false — pi declares no subagent capability
Source: FilesUnderRoot{~/.pi/agent/sessions} + ExactName{pi} + DiscoverPID — no parent/child session transport
ParseLine handles only session/model_change/compaction/message(assistant/user/toolResult/bashExecution) — emits no parent_linked event, sets no ParentSessionID
Step 2.5 guard: zero hits in the shipped runtime dist/. Stock pi binary ships no subagent tool/slash/orchestration.
"skips features like sub agents and plan mode"; not-built list "Sub-agents and plan mode"; "No sub-agents. ... Spawn pi instances via tmux, or build your own with extensions"
Subagent exists ONLY as an opt-in extension example (worker/scout/reviewer custom tools), not stock pi; CHANGELOG PRs #215/#427/#1414/#1559/#3002 call it 'the subagent extension example'
